Wind speeds will generally moderate over the period, and humidity remains high, typically between 64% and 95%.

In Broughton, temperatures will gradually decline from a high of around 8°C on January 3rd to a low of approximately 0°C by January 8th. The period begins with frequent light rain and overcast skies, transitioning to clearer, drier conditions and higher pressure starting January 6th.

In Aridaea, temperatures will gradually decline from a peak of 15.89°C on January 4th to a low of 7.59°C by January 8th. The weather transitions from scattered and overcast clouds to a period of light to moderate rain starting the night of January 6th and persisting through January 7th, with the heaviest rainfall occurring around midnight on the 7th.

Sherwood's weather from January 3rd to 8th will be characterized by fluctuating temperatures ranging from a low of 1.08°C to a peak of 11.12°C. The period starts with broken clouds, transitions to several clear days, and experiences a brief window of light rain on January 5th. Conditions return to clear and overcast patterns toward the end of the period, with wind gusts peaking at 14.48 m/s on January 8th.

Weather in Saint James from January 3rd to 8th will be predominantly cold and cloudy, with temperatures ranging from a high of 6.99°C to a low of -3.56°C. The period starts with clear skies, transitioning to overcast conditions with light snow on January 5th and 7th, and light rain on January 6th. Humidity remains generally high, peaking at 99% on January 7th.

In Rio Chico, temperatures are expected to fluctuate between a low of 23.01°C and a high of 30.28°C. The forecast indicates a pattern of intermittent light rain and cloudy skies, with periods of clear weather occurring sporadically. Humidity levels remain high, peaking at 95%.

In Semeljci, weather will transition from mild and cloudy conditions (highs around 13°C) to a significant cold snap. After periods of light rain between January 4th and 7th, temperatures will drop sharply, falling below freezing by January 8th. This shift will bring snow and light snow, with the lowest temperature reaching -1.24°C and visibility decreasing significantly during snowfall.

In Betz, temperatures will steadily decline from around 9°C on January 3rd to a low of approximately -0.3°C by January 8th. The period starts with frequent light rain and overcast skies, transitioning to cloudy conditions, and ending with light snow and freezing temperatures by January 8th. Winds will generally moderate over time, starting with gusts up to 17.2 m/s and decreasing toward the end of the forecast.

In Ébano (Colonia Veinte de Noviembre), temperatures will fluctuate between a low of 15.73°C and a high of 28.62°C from January 3rd to 8th. The period starts with broken and overcast clouds, transitioning to clear skies around January 5th, before returning to a mix of scattered and overcast conditions. Humidity will vary significantly, peaking at 96% and dropping to 36%.

In Pyhäjoki, temperatures will rise significantly from a freezing low of -26.77°C on January 4th to a high of -3.66°C by January 8th. The weather will transition from broken and overcast clouds to predominantly overcast skies, accompanied by increasing wind speeds and gusts peaking around January 7th.

Târgu Trotuș will experience a significant weather shift from January 3rd to 8th, transitioning from overcast conditions with temperatures peaking around 12.6°C to a cold snap. Starting January 7th, the city will see consistent snowfall and a sharp temperature drop, reaching a low of -7.2°C by January 8th, accompanied by high humidity and reduced visibility.

Nakskov will experience a cooling trend starting January 3rd, transitioning from moderate rain and temperatures around 6°C to light snow and sub-zero temperatures by January 4th. The weather will remain mostly overcast and cold, with temperatures hovering between -3°C and 1°C, before clearing up to sunny skies by January 8th. Wind speeds will peak around 17 m/s during the transition to snow.
